title: IPv4 Addressing, CIDR, VLSM, and Subnet Design · Packet Lens: Net Cidr Network Range
summary: Create an address plan for departments, infrastructure, guests, point-to-point links, growth, and route summarization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net cidr network range increment in a validated IPv4 subnet allocation workbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Calculate network address, broadcast address, usable host range, prefix length, and address count for CIDR blocks.
Identify RFC1918, APIPA, loopback, unspecified, limited broadcast, multicast, and public addressing behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
